scripts.build:fr: npm run sync:assets && npm run build -w @mc/site-fr && node scripts/postbuild-cf.mjs fr
scripts.build:com: npm run sync:assets && npm run build -w @mc/site-com && node scripts/postbuild-cf.mjs com
scripts.build: npm run build:fr && npm run build:com
scripts.bootstrap: npm run sitemaps && npm run sync:assets && npm run regen:pages
scripts.deploy:fr: npm run build:fr && cd sites/fr && CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=d6ea7833b7415d26c328c64195a46352 npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=monsieurclick-fr --branch=fr --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:com: npm run build:com && cd sites/com && CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID=d6ea7833b7415d26c328c64195a46352 npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=monsieurclick-com --branch=en --commit-dirty=true
